title: Analytics Dashboard
alt: The overhauled pause menu that doubles as a company dashboard, displaying real-time factory analytics like playtime, active trucks, and road efficiency.

title: Global Settings Menu
alt: The new comprehensive settings framework, giving players full control over gameplay mechanics like auto-saving, notifications, and vehicle fuel consumption.

title: Factory Research System
alt: A first look at the new Research menu, allowing players to invest their capital into permanent factory upgrades like faster loading docks.

title: Industrial HUD & Build Menu
alt: The fully redesigned in-game HUD featuring real-time economy tracking, calendar time controls, and the clean new tabbed build inventory.

title: Advanced Truck Logistics
alt: A close-up of a high-capacity container truck navigating past upgraded factory buildings in the late-game economy.

title: Multi-Tile Factory Layout
alt: A massive leap in visual scale! Showing off the transition to large multi-tile buildings, streetlights, and a sprawling industrial layout.

title: Visual Feedback System
alt: Testing traffic flow and highlighting the new world-space warning icons that instantly show you when a building is jammed or a truck is stuck.

title: Multi-Resource Storage
alt: The new data-driven Warehouse UI displaying capacity tracking for multiple resource types like Wood and Stone.

title: Expanded Build Menu
alt: The updated inventory UI featuring the newly added advanced road types, including curves, junctions, and merges.

title: Smart Junction Logic
alt: Showcasing the new rule-based routing system that lets you direct specific trucks at intersections to optimize traffic flow.

title: Backend Production Logs
alt: A behind-the-scenes look at the developer console tracking the very first automated wood production and warehouse deliveries.

title: Prototype Logistics Engine
alt: A look at the first automated truck successfully navigating the simple 1x1 road network.

title: Garage Dashboard
alt: The foundational prototype of the game, showcasing the very first build menus and the early grid-based placement system.

title: Early UI & Grid System
alt: The original vehicle management interface, allowing players to purchase their first trucks and track fleet size.
